title: Gearplexed
description:
Shift your mindset into high gear with 72 engaging levels. You may rack your brain and grind your teeth. You may even become perplexed. But don’t get torqued by setbacks, you get as many turns as you need. So brake it down and seize the day!

Transfer Motion

Use gears, racks, and belts to get things moving.

Adjust Speed

Stack gears to make gear ratios.

Get Torqued

See the force.  Use the force.

Three Difficulties of Puzzles

Master mechanical power transition in the Elementary levels. Put yourself to the test in the Puzzling levels. Then think outside the box in Anarchy.

About The Free DemoThe demo has ten levels to help you get in tune with what this game is all about.  The demo levels correspond to 1-1, 1-3, 1-6, 2-1, 2-2, 2-6, 2-8, 1-5, 5-4, and 5-5 from the full version.
description_short: Enjoy playing with gears? Gearplexed is a constructive problem-solving game with a variety of gear-based puzzles ranging from opening gates to building factories. Build gears to get the right amount of speed or torque to the target gears and be careful not to lock up your gear train.
